programmes.show_name: Home: The Story of Zak Moradi
programmes.show_description: Home: The Story of Zak Moradi tells the story of a refugee born in a camp in war-torn Iraq on the day the Gulf War began.
Financing Evil: Who financed Hitler and helped him to achieve power? Here, follow the trail of money to the top and see the secret partnerships that underpinned the evil regime.
Damo confronts his past and his future. Desi's world crumbles.
Cash reveals to Harper that David has taken him off Tane's case because of his friendship with Tane, but also the fact Cash was the one who posted Tane's bail.
Carmel from East Cork, and her daughter Caoimhe are finally turning a long-held dream into reality by searching for a home in Spain's Murcia region.

programmes.show_name: The Hills Are Alive - A Year at Kylemore Abbey
programmes.show_description: As the estate recovers from violent Autumn storms, the nuns and the team get ready for the Christmas build-up.
Reindeer Games: On Christmas Eve, Freddy stretches himself to be there for Frasier, who's coping with Martin's death by throwing a lavish party.
With a new mission and the threat of disbandment facing the SAS, an ally is found with a familiar name.
The first programme offers a wealth of houses once owned by pop stars including; Ballywilliam House, Kinsale, Co Cork once creative studio and spiritual haven of Tori Amos.
Haven: Maureen O'Connell's drama Haven, in which a lonely sheep farmer in her sxities and a mother and baby home survivor form an unlikely friendship with a teenage Somali refugee.
Who The F Is Alice?: Alma decides it's time to start focusing on herself and her career. She joins a stand-up comedy course run by her old acting teacher, Ian.
Struggling to look after herself, Mia reluctantly steps up as guardian for Ella when Chrissy's taken ill.
In the wake of a terrible accident, friends and family rally to support two of their own.
Although Remi is battling the side effects of his treatment, Eden enlists he and Cash to help plan a treat for Sonny,
Live coverage of the Republic of Ireland v North Macedonia from the Aviva Stadium.
Marie Antoinette decides to overhaul her public image.
